title: 🧩subworkflow - aws resize ec2 instance
description:
Subworkflow to resize an ec2 instance (Changes the type of instance)

This subworkflow creates an easy way to trigger
the resizing of an aws ec2 instance with

Parameters:

resize_to_instance_type: (Required) instance type to resize ec2 instance (for example t3.small, t3.medium etc.)
instanceid: (Required) instance id of the ec2 instance to resize 
awsregion: (Required) region in which the ec2 instance to resize resides
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) the connection name of the Dynatrace OIDC Connection

This subworkflow uses the out of the box SSM Document "AWS-ResizeInstance" 
https://us-east-1.console.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager/documents/AWS-ResizeInstance/description?region=us-east-1

Subworkflow will wait for ssm document execution and will fail if ssm document fails

The subworkflow sends the command to resize a ec2 stack to the
aws SSM document "AWS-ResizeInstance", then waits until
the SSM document has finished and then checks if the execution was 
successful. If not, it will fail the subworkflow to provide a restart on error
functionality to the Parent workflow

This subworkflow Needs subworkflow "subworkflow - aws wait for systems manager document execution"
guide:
## 🔧 **Subworkflow to Resize an AWS EC2 Instance (Change Instance Type)**

📐 This subworkflow provides a simple and controlled way to **resize an AWS EC2 instance by changing its instance type** (for example, scaling from `t3.small` to `t3.medium`).

It is commonly used for **cost optimization, performance tuning, or remediation workflows** where instance capacity needs to be adjusted dynamically.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **resize_to_instance_type** (Required): 🏷️ The target EC2 instance type  
  *(e.g. `t3.small`, `t3.medium`, `m5.large`)*

- **instanceid** (Required): 🆔 The ID of the EC2 instance to resize.

- **awsregion** (Required): 🌍 The AWS region where the EC2 instance resides.

- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 The name of the Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection used to authenticate with AWS.

---

### 📘 **AWS SSM Document Used**

This subworkflow uses the out-of-the-box AWS Systems Manager document:

🔗 https://us-east-1.console.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager/documents/AWS-ResizeInstance/description?region=us-east-1

---

### ⏳ **Execution Behavior**

⏱️ The subworkflow waits for the AWS Systems Manager (SSM) document execution to complete.  
❌ If the SSM document execution fails, this subworkflow will also fail.

---

### 🧠 **Workflow Logic**

- 📤 The subworkflow sends a resize command to the AWS SSM document  
  **`AWS-ResizeInstance`**
- ⏳ It waits for the SSM document execution to finish
- ✅ The execution result is validated to confirm a successful resize
- ❌ If the resize fails, the subworkflow fails to enable **restart-on-error** handling in the parent workflow

---

### 🔗 **Workflow Requirement**

This subworkflow Needs subworkflow  
[subworkflow - aws wait for systems manager document execution](/ui/apps/dynatrace.automations/workflows/20661ec0-29d5-471f-9973-29679d5fe908)

---
